headline.purpose: Reflective section-level orientation when the product grows beyond the landing surface.

body.purpose: Explanatory copy, disclaimers, and product language that must stay readable under stress.

label.purpose: Badges, compact UI states, and low-emphasis metadata.

shadows.name: logo-rest
shadows.purpose: Tiny separation for the centered brand mark only.

motion.name: hero-reveal
motion.purpose: Soft entrance for landing elements; must be disabled for reduced motion.

motion.name: ticker-drift
motion.purpose: Ambient emotional-state drift with no hierarchy or interaction.

components.name: Primary Link CTA
components.description: A low-pressure text action for invitations where agency matters more than conversion pressure.
components.css: .ds-link-cta { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; color: var(--brand, #c4622d); border-bottom: 1px solid rgb(196 98 45 / 0.3); padding-bottom: 1px; font-family: var(--font-dm-sans, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif); font-size: 14px; text-decoration: none; transition: color 300ms ease, border-color 300ms ease; } .ds-link-cta span { transition: transform 300ms ease; } .ds-link-cta:hover { border-color: rgb(196 98 45 / 0.7); } .ds-link-cta:hover span { transform: translateX(4px); } .ds-link-cta:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid var(--ring, #6b4e8f); outline-offset: 4px; border-radius: 4px; }

components.name: Status Chip
components.description: A compact informational badge for availability or status without urgency.
components.css: .ds-status-chip { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; border-radius: 9999px; border: 1px solid rgb(212 200 192 / 0.5); background: var(--muted, #ede8e0); color: var(--muted-foreground, #6b6370); padding: 2px 10px; font-family: var(--font-dm-sans, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif); font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.35; }

components.name: Logo Well
components.description: Small framed brand mark treatment used in the sticky navigation.
components.css: .ds-logo-well { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 36px; height: 36px; border-radius: 8px; border: 1px solid var(--border, #d4c8c0); background: var(--muted, #ede8e0); color: var(--foreground, #1e1b24); transition: transform 200ms ease; } .ds-logo-well span { font-size: 18px; line-height: 1; } .ds-logo-well:hover { transform: scale(1.05); } .ds-logo-well:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid var(--ring, #6b4e8f); outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Sticky Header
components.description: A translucent top bar that keeps identity present without adding pressure.
components.html: ✦Magnet CareComing soon
components.css: .ds-header { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; gap: 24px; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border, #d4c8c0); background: rgb(247 244 238 / 0.8); backdrop-filter: blur(12px); padding: 16px 24px; font-family: var(--font-dm-sans, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif); } .ds-brand { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; color: var(--foreground, #1e1b24); font-size: 18px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: -0.01em; text-decoration: none; transition: color 200ms ease; } .ds-brand:hover { color: var(--brand, #c4622d); } .ds-brand-mark { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 36px; height: 36px; border-radius: 8px; border: 1px solid var(--border, #d4c8c0); background: var(--muted, #ede8e0); font-size: 16px; } .ds-header-chip { border-radius: 9999px; border: 1px solid rgb(212 200 192 / 0.5); background: var(--muted, #ede8e0); color: var(--muted-foreground, #6b6370); padding: 2px 10px; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; }

components.name: Ambient State Ticker
components.description: Low-contrast emotional language presented without ranking, scoring, or interaction.
components.html: overwhelmed /not sure yet /returning /ready but uncertain /
components.css: .ds-ticker { overflow: hidden; border-top: 1px solid rgb(212 200 192 / 0.4); padding: 20px 0; font-family: var(--font-dm-sans, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif); } .ds-ticker-track { display: flex; width: max-content; gap: 0; animation: ds-ticker 100s linear infinite; } .ds-ticker span { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; flex-shrink: 0; padding: 0 16px; color: rgb(107 99 112 / 0.4); font-size: 10px; font-weight: 400; letter-spacing: 0.16em; text-transform: uppercase; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-ticker b { margin-left: 16px; color: rgb(212 200 192 / 0.6); font-weight: 400; } @keyframes ds-ticker { from { transform: translateX(0); } to { transform: translateX(-50%); } } @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) { .ds-ticker-track { animation: none; } }

components.name: Future Text Field
components.description: A proposed field primitive for later orientation flows, derived from existing tokens.
components.css: .ds-field { display: grid; gap: 8px; color: var(--foreground, #1e1b24); font-family: var(--font-dm-sans, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif); font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; } .ds-field input { width: 100%; border: 1px solid var(--border, #d4c8c0); border-radius: 8px; background: var(--background, #f7f4ee); color: var(--foreground, #1e1b24); padding: 12px 14px; font: inherit; font-weight: 400; } .ds-field input::placeholder { color: var(--muted-foreground, #6b6370); } .ds-field input:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid var(--ring, #6b4e8f); outline-offset: 3px; } .ds-field input:disabled { cursor: not-allowed; opacity: 0.55; }

narrative.overview:
Magnet Care's interface should feel like a calm room where a person can pause before naming what hurts. The system is warm, mature, spacious, and careful: it gives language and direction without implying diagnosis, urgency, or measurement.

The current surface uses a restrained product palette: warm chalk background, near-black plum text, muted clay as the only primary action color, and a small violet accent for focus and atmospheric depth. The result should feel grounded and human, not therapeutic theater and not wellness marketing.

This system explicitly rejects diagnostic, clinical, crisis-coded, gamified, marketplace, mystical, childish, neon, hospital-blue, generic wellness, meditation-cliche, and dark crisis-coded patterns. The interface walks beside the user; it never interprets them from above.
keyCharacteristics: Spacious centered composition with very few simultaneous decisions.
Warm-neutral surfaces with clay and violet used sparingly.
Serif display type for humane orientation, sans-serif UI type for clarity.
Gentle motion that reveals presence without creating pressure.
Plain disclaimers and boundaries always remain visible and direct.

rules.name: The Sparse Accent Rule
rules.body: Clay and violet are used as signals, not decoration. If a screen reads orange or purple at first glance, the accent is overused.

rules.name: The No Diagnosis Color Rule
rules.body: Never use semantic red, green, or yellow to imply a user's state, score, risk, or progress unless the interaction is explicitly operational and non-clinical.

rules.name: The Labels Stay Sans Rule
rules.body: Display serif is for orientation moments only. Buttons, badges, nav, disclaimers, and product controls stay in DM Sans.

rules.name: The No Shouting Rule
rules.body: Headlines may be large, but they remain light-weight and balanced. Avoid heavy bold display type, aggressive caps, and compressed line-height.

rules.name: The Floor Is Flat Rule
rules.body: Surfaces do not float. If a panel needs hierarchy, use spacing, typography, border tone, or muted background before adding shadow.

dos: Do use Chalk Ground as the dominant page surface and reserve Grounded Clay for the most important human action.
Do keep immediate-help and boundary language calm, direct, and visible.
Do use serif display type for orienting statements and DM Sans for all controls and operational UI.
Do support reduced motion for every animation, including page reveal and ticker movement.
Do let users leave, pause, return, and proceed without shame-coded language or visual pressure.
donts: Don't make Magnet look or behave like a diagnostic tool, clinical assessment, crisis service, AI therapist, or therapy replacement.
Don't use productivity, habit-tracking, streak, badge, level, completion, or accountability product patterns.
Don't rank therapists by score, availability, scarcity, or "best match" certainty.
Don't create a dense content feed, social network, sprawling wellness library, or SEO content farm.
Don't use mystical, childish, neon, hospital-blue, generic wellness, meditation-cliche, or dark crisis-coded aesthetics.
Don't make users feel watched, scored, managed, fixed, rushed, shamed, or forced into deeper disclosure.
Don't copy product language from unrelated projects or use elevator/lift visualization concepts.
Don't use glassmorphism, gradient text, heavy shadows, oversized card radii, side-stripe accents, or decorative motion.
